stemHtml: A pilot in flight hears an urgency message but does not hear any station replying. What action must the pilot take?

options.a: Stop transmitting on the frequency until the Air Traffic Services provide replies.
options.c: Squawk 7700 and re-transmit all urgency messages received on the emergency frequency 121.5 MHz.
options.d: Return to the previous frequency to avoid interfering with urgency communications.
